title: Gov. Rhoden and Colleagues Urge EPA to Increase Renewable Fuel Levels
content: Governor Larry Rhoden and three fellow governors wrote Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Administrator Lee Zeldin, urging him to set higher Renewable Volume Obligation (RVO) levels. â€œOver the past several years, the biofuels industry has made significant investments to expand domestic production capacity and strengthen feedstock supply. Unfortunately, the Renewable Volume Obligation (RVO) levels set by the previous Administration failed to reflect this growth,â€ wroteÂ Governor Larry Rhoden and his colleagues. â€œAs a result, an increasing number of biofuel producersâ€¦have been forced to slow or cease operations, costing rural communities jobs and weakening key markets for American farmers.â€
author: Analysts Account
